name: Grade 3 Culinary Arts & Baking — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 3 pathway for building organized skills, vocabulary, and short research products through Culinary Arts & Baking. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 3 knowledge and transferable skills in building organized skills, vocabulary, and short research products through Culinary Arts & Baking.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
